text:
**IBEW Traveler Snapshot — Monday, July 6, 2026**

**LU-683 Columbus, OH** — **$73.42** top scale makes this a heavyweight destination, and Mid City's dumping 25 calls across various locations. ESI's Cologix Data Center gig pays double time on all OT with guaranteed M-F 40-hour minimums. 117 hands needed across 23 calls—tight board with solid depth.

**LU-481 Indianapolis, IN** — **$54.75** scale with Meade Electric pushing **10% above scale** on the Meta Data Center build in Lebanon. Those 5x12-hour shifts M-F plus Saturday work are brutal but the rollups make it worth the grind. 43 calls, 187 hands—data center work is the golden ticket right now.

**LU-613 Atlanta, GA** — 36 calls chasing 213 hands at **$48.00** top scale. Inglett & Stubbs owns the board with dual projects (QTS Fayette and Wellstar Hospital), both paying **$40+** on 4-10 schedules. Cable splicer work over in Fayette requires three years documented, but Miller's paying **$40.90** for the right hands.

**LU-494 Milwaukee, WI** — Data center gold at Port Washington with **JW wage plus $10/hr base** across four contractors (MJ Electric, Gurtz, Cupertino, Uihlein). 41 calls, 169 hands—this repost is clearly burning through bodies fast. Best pure premium pay on today's snapshot.

**LU-1426 Grand Forks, ND** — Polaris Forge Data Center in Harwood hits **$44.80 scale plus $100/day PD** (non-taxed). Shift differential jobs offer **31.4% premiums**, and Saturday work bumps PD to **$150/day**. Tight 100+ mile radius, but total comp is serious money.

The data center boom is real—these mega-projects are soaking up capacity coast to coast.
